reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio, los baños limpios, con jabón y el secador que funciona. Tiene un restaurant (creo que es sólo para socios) y estacionamiento que podría ser un poco más amplio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean restrooms with soap and a working hairdryer. It has a restaurant (I think it's for members only) and parking that could be a bit larger.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Conviene bajar de la ruta y venir acá. Está limpio, excelente atención y mucha menos gente.

(Translated by Google)
It's worth getting off the main road and coming here. It's clean, the service is excellent, and there are far fewer people.
